member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonElementToObjectConverter
member.summary: Converts JsonElement to primitive types for object properties

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchema
member.summary: Represents a JSON Schema definition Uses System.Text.Json serialization with custom converter

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchemaConverter
member.summary: Custom JSON converter for JsonSchema that replicates Newtonsoft.Json's ShouldSerialize pattern. Omits empty collections and null properties from serialization.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Agents.CodeGen.JsonSchema.JsonSchemaMsgPack
member.summary: MessagePack-specific contract for JSON Schema serialization Shared between CodeGen and CLI projects for binary schema transfer
